context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures a Sharp-based image processing pipeline with proper quality settings, metadata handling, resize options, standard size definitions, and correct dependency placement in package.json.

checklist.name: Auto-rotate EXIF
checklist.description: Pipeline calls .rotate() on the Sharp instance to auto-rotate based on EXIF orientation

checklist.name: Strip EXIF metadata
checklist.description: Pipeline calls .withMetadata({exif: {}}) or equivalent to strip EXIF data

checklist.name: withoutEnlargement flag
checklist.description: Resize call includes withoutEnlargement: true to prevent upscaling

checklist.name: WebP quality and effort
checklist.description: WebP output uses quality of 80 and effort of 4 (e.g., .webp({quality: 80, effort: 4}))

checklist.name: mozjpeg JPEG compression
checklist.description: JPEG output uses mozjpeg: true (e.g., .jpeg({quality: 80, mozjpeg: true}))

checklist.name: Standard size constants
checklist.description: Code defines or uses the standard product size set including at least: 240x240, 400x400, 800x800, and 1600x1600

checklist.name: OG size defined
checklist.description: Standard sizes include an Open Graph variant at 1200x630 with fit: 'contain'

checklist.name: AVIF effort setting
checklist.description: If AVIF output is generated, uses effort: 4 (e.g., .avif({quality: 80, effort: 4}))

checklist.name: Filters non-image files
checklist.description: Batch script filters input files to only process image extensions (jpg, jpeg, png, bmp, tiff)
